title: The Declaration Reaches the World
description: Luffy orders Sogeking to burn the World Government flag, making the crew’s rebellion unmistakable.
scene: Across pages 13, 14, 15, 16, this part follows Luffy, Zoro, Nami, Sanji, Chopper. Luffy orders Sogeking to burn the World Government flag, making the crew’s rebellion unmistakable.

dialogue.speaker: Chopper
dialogue.text: Marimo*! How'd you get here before me!!?

dialogue.speaker: Sogeking
dialogue.text: Ah, you're late. Did you get lost?

dialogue.speaker: Chopper
dialogue.text: What's he been doing all this time?

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: I wonder if he can land safely?

dialogue.speaker: Nico Robin
dialogue.text: I beg of you, Nico Robin...!!!

dialogue.speaker: Sanji
dialogue.text: Say it while you're with us!!!

summary: Luffy orders Sogeking to burn the World Government flag, making the crew’s rebellion unmistakable.
